title: AI Ethics Tools Evaluation Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the process and key criteria for reviewing publicly available AI ethics tools.
elements: Identify Tool Source (e.g., GitHub, Company Website, Research Paper)
Categorize Tool Type (Assessment, Audit, Development, Governance)
Evaluate Against Core Ethical Principles (Fairness, Accountability, Transparency, Privacy)
Determine Policy Applicability (Sector-specific, Jurisdictional, Standard Alignment)
relationships: Starts with source identification, flows into categorization, then concurrent evaluation against ethical principles and practical implementation, concluding with an assessment of policy relevance.
